bridge_equation_v17.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v17 = mean(B_plastic_v16, G_growth_break, 1 - P_break, D_feature_v11, 1 - G_brain_v11)
bridge_equation_v17.structure_term: B_struct_v17 = mean(B_struct_v16, G_struct_break, G_route_break, 1 - P_break, D_structure_v11)
bridge_equation_v17.readiness_term: R_train_v17 = mean(R_train_v16, B_plastic_v17, B_struct_v17, R_break, D_align_v11, 1 - P_break)

project_readout.summary: 训练终式第十七桥开始直接面向平台期问题，尝试把协同护栏从补丁变成更稳定的训练规则约束。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要把第十七桥并回主核，检验平台期是否真的出现松动。
